steps.title: Test the proposed values directly
steps.content: The Roman numerals give the only values we need to check in the equation $x-a=(x-a)(x-31)$. Direct substitution is faster than factoring the whole equation.

steps.title: Check each statement
steps.content:
• I: $x=a$. Left side: $a-a=0$. Right side: $(a-a)(a-31)=0$. True.
  • II: $x=31$. Left side: $31-a$. Right side: $(31-a)(31-31)=0$. Since $a\gt 32$, $31-a\ne0$, so false.
  • III: $x=32$. Left side: $32-a$. Right side: $(32-a)(32-31)=32-a$. True.

steps.title: Choose the answer
steps.content: Only statements I and III must be true. That confirms B.
